text.tspan: se: taste, eat, ingest - vomit, expell
te: hear, receive, sound - speak, emit
no: round, ball, circle - pointy, triangle
pe: open - closed, cover, layer, protection
pu: wet, water, flow - dry, sand
fu: fresh, new, air, clean - old, dirty
li: good, desire, need, important - bad, unimportant
su: up, above, lift - down, oppress
ke: what, question, wonder, doubt, search - know, think
mi: possibility, option, choose - requirement, must
le: repeat, again, loop - once, straight
ne: use, tool, useful - neglect, useless
ku: carry, transport, contain - forget, leave
nu: start, create, begin - end, result
na: not, opposite, false - same, true, equals
ti: thing, object, feel_physical, exist - concept, idea, feel_emotional
ni: single, unit, whole, select - fight, conflict, part
pa: pair, together, with - disconnect, apart, cut, without
mu: many, group, collect, take - few, disperse, give
sa: all, everything, full, complete - nothing, empty
